iteration_0_baseline.notes: Original skill only documented 'nano-pdf edit'. Agent got stuck calling pdfinfo with multiple files in a loop.

iteration_1.notes: Added CLI tool docs (pdftotext, pdfinfo, pdfunite) and Python pypdf examples. Merge task fixed but text extract regressed — agent used shell read on binary PDF, then got stuck in awk/sed loops.

iteration_2.notes: Strengthened guidance to always use Python for extraction, never chain shell pipes. Both tasks pass.

iteration_2_confirmation.notes: Intermittent failures: highlights not fully extracted (text-extract), author from PDF metadata='anonymous' instead of page text (merge-info).

iteration_3.notes: Added explicit guidance: never use PDF metadata for author/title (often wrong), always read page text. Added complete pypdf example for multi-file merge+extract. Added highlights extraction tips.

changes_made: Expanded skill from edit-only to cover reading, extracting, and merging PDFs
Added pdftotext, pdfinfo, pdfunite CLI tool documentation with one-file-at-a-time constraint
Added Python pypdf examples for merge and metadata extraction
Strong guidance to use Python scripts instead of shell pipe chains for parsing
Explicit warning: PDF metadata (author/title) is often wrong — read page text instead
Complete working example for multi-file merge+extract workflow
Tips for number parsing (strip $ and commas), percentage conversion, and highlight extraction
